Hi, I’m Symbat — a curious UX/UI designer creating soft, clear digital experiences.

I’m building a design practice around empathy, playful details, and calm interfaces that make complex things feel easier to use.

I love turning early ideas into polished prototypes — from research and wireframes to visual systems, motion, and portfolio-ready product stories.
